reviews.review_description: Even though it's not like Portal, the challenges are as complicated as in Portal. It took me a bit to understand what i was supposed to be doing. At one point, the image just spun from top down like an old TV. But for most of the time, i was able to operate the timeline. I got stuck on one where i had a hard time landing on a surface above me. Ill go back and keep trying. Good thinking exercises. Each level is a puzzle to figure out. It grew on me after a while once i understood what i was doing.

The gameplay is where Chrono Weaver truly shines. The time-manipulation mechanics are innovative and intuitive, allowing you to rewind, fast-forward, and freeze time to solve intricate puzzles.  The puzzles are brilliantly designed, challenging your wits while making you feel like a genius when you solve them. You do get help as you work through the first few levels and boy was that needed and I can see this getting real hard real quick.  Thankfully you get the chance to replay each scenario so you get better with improvements until you can complete it.  Chrono Weaver is more than just a game, it makes you think and plan, and for me as a lover of puzzles a must-play

This if unique puzzler… you use time manipluation to help you get through the puzzles.

I found the puzzles tricky myself, but with playing the game more and replaying levels, the solution soon became clear.

The sound and graphics are good on this puzzler.
You just need patience to get through the puzzles… and some logic aswell as some thinking outside the box.

One for the puzzle fans

I do love a single story puzzle adventure, this is an early impression Review, graphics are really quite nice, like the idea of the game.
Not too taxing at the moment.
Movement is slick, and plays well.
My AI companion is very helpful.
I’m looking forward to delving deeper into the story, for now I’m enjoying it.
